title: stelis morganii
intro: Stelis morganii, also known as Morgan's orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stelis morganii include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. In herbal preparations, Stelis morganii is often used as a tea or tincture, and it is also used in traditional folk remedies for its purported medicinal properties.
